name: CodeCraft Society
description: Weekly hack nights, beginner-friendly workshops, and a chill space to build side projects together.

name: Green Campus Initiative
description: Planting days, sustainability talks, and campus clean-ups — make friends while caring for the planet.

name: Lens & Light Photo Club
description: Photo walks, portrait sessions, and exhibitions. All skill levels; borrow gear from the club locker.

name: Debate Union
description: Structured debates, public speaking coaching, and friendly tournaments with other schools.

name: Board Game Lounge
description: Casual meetups for tabletop games, card games, and cozy Friday-night hangouts.

name: Lion Intramural Soccer
description: Pick-up games, league nights, and watch parties — all skill levels welcome.
